Description:
Allows searching for card(s) by name or filters. Use the buttons to toggle the spawn / search mode.

The search partially supports filters in the style of ArkhamDB:
k - Trait
o - cost
p - level
f - class
z - slot
t - type

To use a filter, use the abbreviation and then an operator (:, !, < or >) followed by the filter value. Example:
k:criminal t!investigator
Name: Custom_Tile
